metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace

properties.displayName: Entra ID - Impossible travel detected for privileged or VIP account
properties.description: Detects sign-ins from the same account at two locations whose straight-line distance requires a travel speed exceeding 800 km/h, making physical travel impossible. The rule boosts risk priority for accounts on the VIPUsers or PrivilegedAccounts watchlists. ATT&CK: T1078.004 - Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts (Initial Access / Assume Breach). TUNE: MaxSpeedKmh (default 800), MinDistanceKm (default 50), LookbackWindow (default 1d). Review TUNE comments in the query before deployment.
properties.query:
// ── Thresholds — TUNE: document changes in docs/tuning-notes.md ──────────
let MaxSpeedKmh   = 800;       // TUNE: impossible-travel speed threshold (km/h)
let LookbackWindow = 1d;       // TUNE: evaluation window per scheduled run
let MinDistanceKm  = 50;       // TUNE: minimum distance to suppress same-metro noise
let EarthRadiusKm  = 6371.0;  // Earth mean radius — do not tune
// ── Watchlist lookups ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let VIPList = _GetWatchlist("VIPUsers")
    | project UPN = UserPrincipalName, ObjId = ObjectId, VIPReason;
let PrivList = _GetWatchlist("PrivilegedAccounts")
    | project UPN = UserPrincipalName, ObjId = ObjectId, AssignedRole, RoleSource;
// ── Base events: interactive sign-ins with geolocation ────────────────────
let SignIns = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackWindow)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where isnotempty(LocationDetails)
    | extend Lat = toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude),
             Lon = toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude),
             City     = tostring(LocationDetails.city),
             Country  = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
    | where isnotnull(Lat) and isnotnull(Lon)
    | project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, UserId,
              IPAddress, City, Country, Lat, Lon,
              AppDisplayName, ConditionalAccessStatus, MfaDetail;
// ── Pair consecutive sign-ins per user and compute speed ──────────────────
let Pairs = SignIns
    | sort by UserPrincipalName asc, TimeGenerated asc
    | extend PrevTime  = prev(TimeGenerated,  1),
             PrevLat   = prev(Lat,  1),
             PrevLon   = prev(Lon,  1),
             PrevCity  = prev(City, 1),
             PrevCountry = prev(Country, 1),
             PrevIP    = prev(IPAddress, 1),
             PrevUPN   = prev(UserPrincipalName, 1)
    | where UserPrincipalName == PrevUPN
    | extend ElapsedHours = datetime_diff('second', TimeGenerated, PrevTime) / 3600.0
    | where ElapsedHours > 0
    | extend DeltaLatRad = (Lat  - PrevLat)  * pi() / 180,
             DeltaLonRad = (Lon  - PrevLon)  * pi() / 180,
             Lat1Rad = PrevLat * pi() / 180,
             Lat2Rad = Lat     * pi() / 180
    | extend A = sin(DeltaLatRad / 2) * sin(DeltaLatRad / 2)
             + cos(Lat1Rad) * cos(Lat2Rad)
             * sin(DeltaLonRad / 2) * sin(DeltaLonRad / 2)
    | extend DistanceKm = 2 * EarthRadiusKm * asin(sqrt(A))
    | where DistanceKm > MinDistanceKm
    | extend SpeedKmh = DistanceKm / ElapsedHours
    | where SpeedKmh > MaxSpeedKmh;
// ── Apply watchlist joins and RiskScore boost ──────────────────────────────
Pairs
| join kind=leftouter (VIPList)  on $left.UserPrincipalName == $right.UPN
| join kind=leftouter (PrivList) on $left.UserPrincipalName == $right.UPN
| extend IsVIP  = isnotempty(VIPReason),
         IsPriv = isnotempty(AssignedRole)
// TUNABLE: +10 VIP-only, +10 Priv-only, +25 both (iff — not cumulative addition)
| extend RiskBoost = case(IsVIP and IsPriv, 25, IsVIP or IsPriv, 10, 0)
| extend RiskScore = RiskBoost
| extend RiskLabel = case(
    IsVIP and IsPriv, strcat(UserPrincipalName, " [VIP+PRIV — HIGHEST PRIORITY]"),
    IsVIP,            strcat(UserPrincipalName, " [VIP]"),
    IsPriv,           strcat(UserPrincipalName, " [PRIV]"),
    UserPrincipalName)
| sort by RiskScore desc, TimeGenerated desc
| project TimeGenerated, RiskLabel, RiskScore,
          IsVIP, IsPriv, VIPReason, AssignedRole, RoleSource,
          PrevTime, PrevCity, PrevCountry, PrevIP,
          City, Country, IPAddress,
          DistanceKm = round(DistanceKm, 1),
          SpeedKmh   = round(SpeedKmh, 1),
          ElapsedHours = round(ElapsedHours, 4),
          AppDisplayName, ConditionalAccessStatus
